summary: Alcohol screening and counseling are too often compressed or skipped during doctor's visits — a gap that is costing patients and the health care system.

title: Supreme Court temporarily extends women’s access to a widely used abortion pill

summary: A South American court upheld the steps taken by the Colombian government when it issued a compulsory license two years ago for an HIV medicine.
